  node with scale=macro and satisfied deps. Write the experiment script, then submit via: uv run python3 tools/gpu_queue.py submit <script.py>. ONLY submit CUDA-bound work (training,     
  inference, eval) — never CPU-bound metrics/analysis. Queue ALL ready tasks at once — the worker chains them back-to-back. Check results... [truncated, 676 chars total]
